sections.title: Everyday Menu
items: Please inform a manager or Chef's Assistant prior to ordering if someone in your party requires special dietary accommodations
Bacon, Egg and Cheese Croissant (FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)-
bacon, egg and cheese on a fresh baked croissant
Ham, Egg and Cheese Croissant (FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)-
ham, egg and cheese on a fresh baked croissant
Request no potato salad for egg-sensitive options.
Request no cheese or potato salad for dairy-sensitive options.
Grilled Cheese & Tomato Soup(ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)-
grilled cheese made with cheddar, muenster and mozzarella topped with bacon jam and served with a cup of creamy tomato soup
Grilled Cheese & Clam Chowder Soup(ES, FS, PS, SES, SS, TNS)-
grilled cheese made with cheddar, muenster and mozzarella topped with bacon jam and served with a cup of clam chowder soup
Caprese (FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, V)-
fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh basil, sundried tomato pesto and basil aioli served on rosemary focaccia bread
Roast Beef (FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)-
shaved roast beef, arugula, pickled onions, Swiss cheese, brown mustard served on rosemary focaccia bread
Hot Turkey Panini(FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)-
shaved turkey, Gouda, bacon and roasted tomato aioli served on warm ciabatta
Chilled Tuna Noodle Salad*(DS, ES, PS, SFS, TNS)-
sesame seared tuna, sweet potato noodles, carrots, cucumber, cilantro, calamansi soy vinaigrette
Chilled Tofu Noodle Salad(DS, ES, FS, PS, SFS, TNS, VG)-
tofu, sweet potato noodles, carrots, cucumber, cilantro, calamansi soy vinaigrette
Chilled Noodle Salad(DS, ES, FS, PS, SFS, TNS, VG)-
sweet potato noodles, carrots, cucumber, cilantro, calamansi soy vinaigrette
mixed greens, edamame, cucumbers, cilantro, grilled chicken breast, crisp wontons, peanut ginger soy dressing
Tomato & Mozzarella Salad (ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, V)-
fresh mozzarella, cherry tomatoes, fresh basil, spring mix, croutons tossed in a lemon vinaigrette
Clam Chowder in Artisan Bread(ES, FS, PS, SES, SS, TNS)-
our classic clam chowder served in an artisan bread boule

Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Get 3–6 souvenir cups for each, 2 for each, or 1 for at participating Coca-Cola Freestyle® locations. *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.

GS – Gluten Sensitive DS – Dairy Sensitive ES – Egg Sensitive PS - Peanut Sensitive TNS – Tree Nut Sensitive FS - Fish Sensitive
SFS – Shellfish Sensitive SES – Sesame Sensitive SS – Soy Protein Sensitive V - Vegetarian VG - Vegan
Menu items and pricing are subject to change without notice.
